# Aryan Panwar Portfolio

## Description
Portfolio of Aryan Panwar, a Gen AI Engineer and AI Product Manager. Specialized in building production-grade AI systems, LLM orchestration, and agentic AI.

## Professional Summary
Final-year ECE student at MIET Meerut who has successfully shipped 3 AI products. Focuses on the intersection of hardware logic and software intelligence to build next-generation agentic systems.

## Key Products & Projects
- **FitWardrobe**: AI-powered fashion recommendation system with multi-modal capabilities.
- **Mithivoices**: Advanced AI voice synthesis and cloning platform.
- **SEO-GEO Optimizer**: Autonomous multi-agent system for site intelligence and optimization.

## Technical Expertise
- **AI/ML**: LLM Orchestration, RAG, Agentic Frameworks, LLMOps, Prompt Engineering.
- **Web Development**: React, Node.js, Python, Vanilla JS/CSS, Modern Web Architecture.
- **Systems**: Embedded Systems, ECE, IoT Automation, Hardware-Software Integration.
